name: Lootlocker
description: LootLocker — Game BaaS with player accounts, leaderboards, virtual currencies, and achievements for Unity and Unreal.

seo.title: Lootlocker — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Lootlocker: LootLocker — Game BaaS with player accounts, leaderboards, virtual currencies, and achievements for Unity and Unreal.

when_to_use: Leaderboards, player profiles, and achievements for Unity games
Virtual currency and item store for Unreal Engine games
Cross-platform player identity and persistence system
Game BaaS with REST API for any engine without lock-in
Instant game backend setup without managing server infra

pros: Zero-friction player accounts for Unity and Unreal
cons: Pricing scales steeply at top tier
review.verdict: Great indie-friendly game BaaS that gets you shipping fast, but lighter than PlayFab for big titles.
review.best_for: Indie and mid-size Unity/Unreal studios shipping games with standard social features
review.not_for: AAA studios needing deep live-ops analytics and custom economy modeling

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier, no explicit peak-lock evidence
